arts.ttl: Full Arsenal squad available for Crystal Palace as three players miss out but duo return
arts.sum: Arsenal are busy preparing for their return to Premier League action this evening as they travel to face Crystal Palace. Arsenal will be able to call on Neto once again after the goalkeeper was unavailable to face Palace in midweek due to being cup-tied following an appearance with parent club Bournemouth earlier in the campaign.
